MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant RYAN BALLOU in propria pesona 282-4722 and demurring party

Mr. Ballou attempted to give notice of his intent to argue the tentative ruling. Opposing counsel Susan Parkinson has a block on Mr. Ballou's phone calls. Matter argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Defendant RYAN BALLOU's demurrer is overruled with 5 days leave to answer. (JJM/kh) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
